desc._value: A potion made out of red herbs. Recovers 100 HP.
A concentrated potion made out of red herbs.\nRecovers 250 HP.
A highly concentrated potion made out of red herbs.\nRecovers 500 HP.
A potion made out of blue herbs. Recovers 200 MP.
A legendary potion.\nRestores 35% of HP and MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown before it can be used again.
A legendary potion.\nRestores 100% of HP and MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown before it can be used again.
A legendary potion.\nRestores 50% of MP, but due to its powerful effect, there is a cooldown before it can be used again.
Increases Attack Power.\nAttack Power +10 for 10 min.
Increases Magic Attack.\nMagic Attack +10 for 10 min.
Increases Accuracy.\nAccuracy +5 for 10 min.
Increases Avoidability.\nAvoidability +5 for 10 min.
Increases Speed.\nSpeed +8 for 10 min.
A set of tools that make weaponcrafting more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from weaponcrafting by 10% for 15 minutes.
A set of tools that make woodcrafting more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from woodcrafting by 10% for 15 minutes.
A set of tools that make smithing more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from smithing by 10% for 15 minutes.
A set of tools that make leatherworking more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from leatherworking by 10% for 15 minutes.
A set of tools that make tailoring more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from tailoring by 10% for 15 minutes.
A set of tools that make arcforge more convenient. Using it increases the amount of crafting skill EXP gained from arcforge by 10% for 15 minutes.

A ripe, red apple.
Recovers HP 30.

#cTo eat Roger's Apple, simply double-click on it in your use inventory#.
A red, ripe, and tasty apple.\nRecovers around 40 HP.
A nutritious egg.\nRecovers around 60 HP.
A tasty-looking meat.\nRecovers around 160 HP.
A sweet, tasty orange.\nRecovers around 50 MP.
Very sour.\nRecovers around 150 MP.
A very ripe watermelon.\nRecovers about 800 HP and 800 MP.
Sour and crunchy green apple.\nRecovers MP +30.
Drake's blood. \nAttack Power +12 for 5 min.
It's honey, the fairies' favorite.\nAvoidability +10 for 5 min.
Sap of a thousands-of-years-old tree. \nMagic Attack +12 for 5 min.
Drake's meat.\nWeapon Def. +10 for 5 min.
Made out of fresh vegetable.\nRecovers 200 MP.
Well-fried chicken.\nRecovers around 120 HP.
A cake full of sweetness. Recovers 100 for both HP and MP.
A freshly-baked pizza. Recovers 360 HP.
A hamburger with bulgogi in it. Recovers 500 HP.
A hotdog with ketchup on it. Recovers 300 HP.
A huge hot dog. Recovers 600 HP.
Well-dried. Recovers 300 HP.
Tastes great, and is quite nutritious. Recovers 800 HP.
Pure OJ... Recovers 450 MP.
Used real grapes for this. Recovers 900 MP.
A cup ramen with awesome soup.\nRecovers 40% of HP and MP.
A tasty ice cream pop.\nRecovers around 1500 HP.
Definitely lets you forget about the hot hot summer. \nRecovers around 1500 MP.
Very clean water.\nRecovers up to 800 MP.
A hot steamy porridge made out of red beans. At an HP-decreasing map, whenever such map damage is dealt, 10 HP will be protected.
A cold softdrink.\nAttack Power +15 for 5 min.\nAccuracy -5 for 5 min., though.
Well-seasoned eel.\nRecovers 1000 HP.

A special blessing from the GM that makes you feel as light as a feather.

#cSpeed +30
Jump +10#

#cStacks with other boost effects.#
#cEffects disappear upon relogin.#

A special blessing from the GM that sharpens your senses.

#cAccuracy +20#

#cStacks with other boost effects.#
#cEffects disappear upon relogin.#
How much Meso is in this pouch, anyway?
A Meso Pouch containing 10000 Mesos.
A Meso Pouch containing 50000 Mesos.
Returns you to the nearest town.
Returns you to Lith Harbor.
Returns you to Ellinia.
Returns you to Perion.
Returns you to Henesys.
Returns you to the dark Kerning City.
Returns you to Sleepywood, a quiet and dark forest-town.
Returns you to Forgotten Hollow.

Small pets love them. Restores 30 Fullness. Can be purchased in town #cGeneral Stores# or some town #cPet Food Merchants#. NOT for human consumption!
Can be used on suspected botters. Usable only when a suspect is hunting.
A special shell only found through Mano. Apparently it's powerful enough to grant a wish...

An ancient collection of poems and life lessons from various elders, sages and warriors in the Maple World. Reading this allows one to gain their collective experience (EXP) in a single second.  This edition provides 500 EXP.
A box locked away with a powerful magical lock. Apparently there are jewels inside.
A box with a variety of outfits recommended by Natalia.
A box with a variety of outfits recommended by Natalia.

#cDouble-click# to obtain the below items.

- Leaf Points 10,000 Exchange Coupon x5
- Regular Store Permit x1
- Megaphone x10
- Super Megaphone x5
- Red Potion x30
- Blue Potion x30
#c Double-click# to get #c1,000 Leaf Points#.
#cDouble-click# to receive a #c2x EXP# buff for #c30 minutes#.\r\n\r\n#cEffect does not stack with similar event buffs.#
#cDouble-click# to receive a #c3x EXP# buff for #c15 minutes.\r\n\r\nEffect does not stack with similar event buffs.
